title: athyrium × gurungae
intro: Athyrium × gurungae, also known as the Himalayan lady fern or Gurung's lady fern, is a hybrid fern species that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium × gurungae include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, or used in various other forms, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
